summary: Testing of Certification Agreement feature. Found and fixed 2 bugs: 1) Agreement page showing error for agreement_signed status, 2) Proposal page not showing accepted state for agreement_signed status. All 8 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend tests pass for agreement page display, language switching, and RTL/LTR layout.

fixed_bugs.issue: Agreement page showed 'Agreement Not Available' error when proposal status was 'agreement_signed' after agreement submission
fixed_bugs.fix: Updated loadProposal() to first check agreement status via /api/public/agreement endpoint, and handle both 'accepted' and 'agreement_signed' statuses

fixed_bugs.issue: Proposal page showed full proposal details instead of 'Proposal Accepted' screen when status was 'agreement_signed'
fixed_bugs.fix: Updated condition to check for both 'accepted' and 'agreement_signed' statuses, showing appropriate message for each

critical_code_review_comments: Agreement submission flow works correctly via POST /api/public/agreement/{access_token}/submit
Proposal status properly updates from 'accepted' to 'agreement_signed' after agreement submission
Agreement status endpoint GET /api/public/agreement/{access_token} correctly returns pending or submitted status
Duplicate agreement submission correctly blocked with 400 error
RTL/LTR layout switching works correctly on agreement page
Language switcher works correctly - switching between Arabic and English
All data-testid attributes present for key interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Used existing proposal with access_token: 7e9465b4-fa2d-4ba9-8baf-05e5d32cd971. Agreement was submitted during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Certification Agreement feature fully tested and working. Agreement submission flow: 1) Client accepts proposal on PublicProposalPage - proposal status changes to 'accepted', 2) Client redirected to /agreement/{access_token} page, 3) Agreement form pre-fills data from proposal, 4) Client fills remaining fields (signatory info, acknowledgements), 5) Client submits - agreement saved, proposal status changes to 'agreement_signed', 6) Success page shown. The test proposal (7e9465b4-fa2d-4ba9-8baf-05e5d32cd971) has agreement submitted - status is 'agreement_signed'. For testing fresh agreement flow, create a new proposal via admin dashboard.

mocked_integrations.email_sending: MOCKED - Email sending logs to console instead of sending real emails (SMTP not configured)

bugs_fixed_during_testing.description: Agreement page showed 'Agreement Not Available' error when proposal status was 'agreement_signed'
bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: loadProposal() only checked for status === 'accepted', but after agreement submission, status changes to 'agreement_signed'
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix_applied: Added check for agreement status first via /api/public/agreement endpoint, and handle 'agreement_signed' status to show success page

bugs_fixed_during_testing.description: Proposal page showed full details instead of 'Proposal Accepted' screen when status was 'agreement_signed'
bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: Conditional render only checked for status === 'accepted'
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix_applied: Updated condition to (status === 'accepted' || status === 'agreement_signed') with appropriate messages for each state

english.agreementAlreadySigned: The certification agreement has already been signed.
